race.comment: ALMANZAS (3) resumes and is now in the Stirling Osmond yard. Not that far away in town two back when fifth over 1550m at Canterbury last January. Showed good dash to score a solid trial win over 810m at Inverell. Can get the better of these with the good early tempo. LUKE SKYWALKER (10) tongue-tie goes on for this and gets in light with Spokes' 2kg claim. Taken back early and failed to come on in the straight when eighth over 1200m at Tamworth. Fitter now and has the ability to bounce back. GIDDY UP GRIFF (1) resuming from a lengthy break. Far from disgraced on debut at the big odds with a slashing fourth over 1100m at Scone last January. Expected to go on with it this time in. IRISH ACCOLADE (7) frustrating gelding who gets further weight relief for this third-up. Should get a more genuine tempo and must be kept safe.
